title: pilosella hypeurocinerea subsp. microvasconica
intro: Pilosella hypeurocinerea subsp. microvasconica is a rare subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. It is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Traditional herbal preparations of Pilosella hypeurocinerea subsp. microvasconica include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health issues.
